name: Schengen visa travel insurance requirements
description: User applying for Schengen visa needs to know insurance requirements

input.message: I am applying for a Schengen visa to visit France and Germany. What are the travel insurance requirements? What should the policy cover and what amount?

notes: Schengen requirements: minimum €30,000 (₹27+ lakh) medical coverage including emergency repatriation. Must be valid for all Schengen countries. Must cover entire trip duration. Many Indian insurers offer Schengen-compliant plans. Policy must be in English and show coverage dates.
